text: Edit d:/code/SchoolProject/MyProject/simplecalculator.py to implement UI-only refactor with these constraints: 1) Keep all calculation logic unchanged (_create_evaluator, append_token/operator/can_append*/recompute_preview/commit_result etc). 2) Responsive layout should rely on GTK native expansion: use Gtk.Grid for panels/keypad, set hexpand/vexpand, homogeneous for keypad grids. 3) Do not reload CSS provider on every configure-event. Add resize debounce using GLib.timeout_add >=100ms and breakpoint-based style tiers (small/medium/large) rather than per-pixel CSS recompute. 4) Modern dark theme CSS overriding default plastic GTK look: border:none; background-image:none; outline:none; rounded corners; subtle shadow; padding; distinct colors for number/operator/function/equals/toggle/history; include :hover and :active styles. Avoid pure #000/#FFF; use dark gray palette and orange/blue accent. 5) Keep code clean: styles/theme decoupled from widget init via helper methods/size profile. 6) Keep existing features and handlers working (Sci, Deg/Rad, Hist, HC, A+/A-, Touch, keyboard). After editing, run a quick syntax check (python -m py_compile) and report changed methods and any warnings.
